mainEntity.name: Keg or Preserves Jar — which is better?

acceptedAnswer.text: Kegs for high-value fruit (Starfruit Wine: 3,150g, Ancient Fruit Wine: 2,310g with Artisan). Preserves Jars for vegetables and low-value crops (faster processing). Rule: Keg for fruit, Preserves Jar for everything else.

mainEntity.name: How do I maximize Stardew Valley profits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Choose Tiller then Artisan professions. Fill greenhouse with Ancient Fruit. Build sheds of Kegs. Plant Starfruit on Ginger Island in Summer. Use Deluxe Speed-Gro. Process everything through artisan equipment.
